title: Coordinate operations of a motor sport team
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate operations of a motor sport team demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for motor sport event

pcs.text: Check and interpret controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations requirements1.2 Identify team member roles and responsibilities for event and check for compliance with controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations and modify as necessary1.3 Clarify team goals and roles and responsibilities of each team member with team members1.4 Document agreed roles and responsibilities according to team procedures1.5 Estimate team financial requirements in consultation with team members and prepare team budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and interpret controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations requirements1.2 Identify team member roles and responsibilities for event and check for compliance with controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations and modify as necessary1.3 Clarify team goals and roles and responsibilities of each team member with team members1.4 Document agreed roles and responsibilities according to team procedures1.5 Estimate team financial requirements in consultation with team members and prepare team budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and interpret controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations requirements1.2 Identify team member roles and responsibilities for event and check for compliance with controlling body rules, category rules and supplementary regulations and modify as necessary1.3 Clarify team goals and roles and responsibilities of each team member with team members1.4 Document agreed roles and responsibilities according to team procedures1.5 Estimate team financial requirements in consultation with team members and prepare team budget.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for motor sport event

elements.title: Develop team competition strategy

pcs.text: Seek input into competition strategy from team members, review performance in previous events, and examine current event conditions 2.2 Develop team strategy to attain competitive advantage2.3 Develop and document contingency plans as part of strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek input into competition strategy from team members, review performance in previous events, and examine current event conditions 2.2 Develop team strategy to attain competitive advantage2.3 Develop and document contingency plans as part of strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek input into competition strategy from team members, review performance in previous events, and examine current event conditions 2.2 Develop team strategy to attain competitive advantage2.3 Develop and document contingency plans as part of strategy.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop team competition strategy

elements.title: Coordinate team participation at event

pcs.text: Develop team event schedule and distribute to team members3.2 Arrange team travel and accommodation requirements3.3 Allocate event day tasks and brief team members3.4 Supervise competition vehicle preparation as required and arrange transport requirements 3.5 Document financial transactions according to team procedures3.6 Supervise team operations at events and make regular checks of team members
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop team event schedule and distribute to team members3.2 Arrange team travel and accommodation requirements3.3 Allocate event day tasks and brief team members3.4 Supervise competition vehicle preparation as required and arrange transport requirements 3.5 Document financial transactions according to team procedures3.6 Supervise team operations at events and make regular checks of team members?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop team event schedule and distribute to team members3.2 Arrange team travel and accommodation requirements3.3 Allocate event day tasks and brief team members3.4 Supervise competition vehicle preparation as required and arrange transport requirements 3.5 Document financial transactions according to team procedures3.6 Supervise team operations at events and make regular checks of team members.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Coordinate team participation at event

elements.title: Coordinate post-event activities

pcs.text: Arrange and attend post-event team debriefing sessions 4.2 Coordinate competition vehicle post-event check and repairs as required4.3 Coordinate component and material replenishment 4.4 Prepare and present financial reports to team members for review as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange and attend post-event team debriefing sessions 4.2 Coordinate competition vehicle post-event check and repairs as required4.3 Coordinate component and material replenishment 4.4 Prepare and present financial reports to team members for review as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange and attend post-event team debriefing sessions 4.2 Coordinate competition vehicle post-event check and repairs as required4.3 Coordinate component and material replenishment 4.4 Prepare and present financial reports to team members for review as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Coordinate post-event activities

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
